title: October 4
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 4''' is the 277th day of the year (278th in leap years). There are 88 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[Marcia Lucas]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Alan Rosenberg]] is born.
*1950 – [[Tom Spackman]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 35|''Star Wars Weekly'' 35]] published.
*[[1979]] – [[Rachael Leigh Cook]] is born.
*[[1982]] – ''[[Iceworld]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1986]] – "[[The Totem Master]]" and "[[A Gift for Shodu]]" air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[2000]] – [[Darth Maul (2000) 2|''Darth Maul'' (2000) 2]] published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale (webstrip)]]'' begins release on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2016]] – ''[[The Amazing Book of Star Wars]]'' published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2016)|''Star Wars Complete Locations'']] 2016 edition published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]'' Beta early access period begins.
*2017 – [[Captain Phasma 3|''Captain Phasma'' 3]] published.
*2017 – [[Darth Vader (2017) 6|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 6]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars (2015) 37|''Star Wars'' (2015) 37]] published.
*2017 – "[[The Starfighter Stunt]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: Geektionary: The Galaxy from A - Z]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars: Alien Archive]]'' published in the UK.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Spark of the Resistance]]'' published.
*2019 – [[Force Friday|Triple Force Friday]] held.
*2019 – ''[[Ultimate Star Wars, New Edition]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Force Collector]]'' published in the UK.
*2019 – [[Diahann Carroll]] dies.
*[[2022]] – ''[[The High Republic: Path of Deceit]]'' published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic: Path of Deceit (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Path of Deceit'' audiobook]] released.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 6]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – [[Bounty Hunters 39|''Bounty Hunters'' 39]] published.
*2023 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 39|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 39]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic – Shadows of Starlight 1|''The High Republic – Shadows of Starlight'' 1]] published.
*2023 – [[Shawna Trpcic]] dies.
<noinclude>
